28007.title: Reconsidering Risk Aversion
28007.authors: Daniel J. Benjamin, Mark Alan Fontana, Miles S. Kimball
28007.abstract: Risk aversion is typically inferred from real or hypothetical choices over risky lotteries, but such “untutored” choices may reflect mistakes rather than preferences. We develop a procedure to obtain a better measure of normatively relevant preferences: after eliciting untutored choices, we confront participants with their choices that are inconsistent with intertemporal-expected-utility axioms and allow them to reconsider their choices. We demonstrate this procedure via a survey about hypothetical retirement investment choices administered to 596 Cornell students. We find that, on average, reconsidered choices are more consistent with almost all axioms, with one exception related to a counterfactual reference point.
28007.zh_abstract: 风险厌恶通常从对风险彩票的真实或假设选择中推断出来，但这种“未经指导的”选择可能反映的是错误而非偏好。我们开发了一个程序来获得规范性相关偏好的更好度量：在引出未经指导的选择后，我们让参与者面对其与跨期期望效用公理不一致的选择，并允许他们重新考虑自己的选择。我们通过对596名康奈尔学生进行的关于假设退休投资选择的调查来演示这一程序。我们发现，平均而言，重新考虑后的选择与几乎所有公理更加一致，但有一个与反事实参照点相关的例外。

28006.title: How Should Tax Progressivity Respond to Rising Income Inequality?
28006.zh_title: 税收累进性应如何应对收入不平等加剧？
28006.authors: Jonathan Heathcote, Kjetil Storesletten, Giovanni L. Violante
28006.abstract: We address this question in a heterogeneous-agent incomplete-markets model featuring exogenous idiosyncratic risk, endogenous skill investment, and flexible labor supply. The tax and transfer schedule is restricted to be log-linear in income, a good description of the US system. Rising inequality is modeled as a combination of skill-biased technical change and growth in residual wage dispersion. When facing shifts in the income distribution like those observed in the US, a utilitarian planner chooses higher progressivity in response to larger residual inequality but lower progressivity in response to widening skill price dispersion reflecting technical change. Overall, optimal progressivity is approximately unchanged between 1980 and 2016. We document that the progressivity of the actual US tax and transfer system has similarly changed little since 1980, in line with the model prescription.
28006.zh_abstract: 我们在一个具有外生异质性风险、内生技能投资和弹性劳动供给的异质性代理人不完全市场模型中探讨这一问题。税收和转移支付计划被限制为收入的对数线性形式，这很好地描述了美国体系。不平等加剧被建模为技能偏向型技术变化和残差工资离散度增长的组合。当面临类似美国观察到的收入分布变化时，功利主义规划者会选择更高的累进性以应对更大的残差不平等，但会选择更低的累进性以应对反映技术变化的技能价格离散度扩大。总体而言，1980年至2016年间最优累进性大致保持不变。我们记录到，自1980年以来，美国实际税收和转移支付体系的累进性同样变化甚微，这与模型建议一致。
28006.meta: Programs：EFG, PE；JEL：E24, H21, J24, J3, J31

28005.title: The Slope of the Phillips Curve: Evidence from U.S. States
28005.zh_title: 菲利普斯曲线的斜率：来自美国各州的证据
28005.authors: Jonathon Hazell, Juan Herreño, Emi Nakamura, Jón Steinsson
28005.abstract: We estimate the slope of the Phillips curve in the cross section of U.S. states using newly constructed state-level price indexes for non-tradeable goods back to 1978. Our estimates indicate that the slope of the Phillips curve is small and was small even during the early 1980s. We estimate only a modest decline in the slope of the Phillips curve since the 1980s. We use a multi-region model to infer the slope of the aggregate Phillips curve from our regional estimates. Applying our estimates to recent unemployment dynamics yields essentially no missing disinflation or missing reinflation over the past few business cycles. Our results imply that the sharp drop in core inflation in the early 1980s was mostly due to shifting expectations about long-run monetary policy as opposed to a steep Phillips curve, and the greater stability of inflation since the 1990s is mostly due to long-run inflationary expectations becoming more firmly anchored.
28005.zh_abstract: 我们利用新构建的、可追溯至1978年的美国各州非贸易品价格指数，在截面数据上估计了菲利普斯曲线的斜率。我们的估计表明，菲利普斯曲线的斜率很小，即使在20世纪80年代初期也是如此。我们估计自20世纪80年代以来，菲利普斯曲线的斜率仅出现了适度下降。我们使用一个多区域模型，从我们的区域估计中推断出总体菲利普斯曲线的斜率。将我们的估计应用于近期的失业动态，结果显示在过去几个商业周期中，基本上不存在缺失的通缩或缺失的再通胀。我们的结果表明，20世纪80年代初核心通胀率的急剧下降主要是由于对长期货币政策的预期转变，而非陡峭的菲利普斯曲线；而自20世纪90年代以来通胀率更加稳定，主要是由于长期通胀预期变得更加稳固。

28004.title: Macroeconomic Outcomes and COVID-19: A Progress Report
28004.zh_title: 宏观经济结果与COVID-19：进展报告
28004.abstract: This paper combines data on GDP, unemployment, and Google's COVID-19 Community Mobility Reports with data on deaths from COVID-19 to study the macroeconomic outcomes of the pandemic. We present results from an international perspective using data at the country level as well as results for individual U.S. states and key cities throughout the world. The data from these different levels of geographic aggregation offer a remarkably similar view of the pandemic despite the substantial heterogeneity in outcomes. Countries like Korea, Japan, Germany, and Norway and cities such as Tokyo and Seoul have comparatively few deaths and low macroeconomic losses. At the other extreme, New York City, Lombardy, the United Kingdom, and Madrid have many deaths and large macroeconomic losses. There are fewer locations that seem to succeed on one dimension but suffer on the other, but these include California and Sweden. The variety of cases potentially offers useful policy lessons regarding how to use non-pharmaceutical interventions to support good economic and health outcomes.
28004.zh_abstract: 本文结合GDP、失业率、谷歌COVID-19社区流动性报告以及COVID-19死亡数据，研究疫情对宏观经济的影响。我们利用国家层面的数据从国际视角呈现结果，同时也分析了美国各州和全球主要城市的情况。尽管结果存在显著异质性，但这些不同地理聚合层面的数据对疫情提供了极为相似的看法。韩国、日本、德国和挪威等国家，以及东京和首尔等城市，死亡人数相对较少，宏观经济损失也较低。在另一个极端，纽约市、伦巴第、英国和马德里死亡人数众多，宏观经济损失巨大。似乎在一方面成功但在另一方面遭受损失的地点较少，但其中包括加利福尼亚和瑞典。这些多样化的案例可能为如何利用非药物干预措施支持良好的经济和健康结果提供有用的政策教训。

28003.title: Impact of Consequence Information on Insurance Choice
28003.zh_title: 后果信息对保险选择的影响
28003.abstract: Insurance choices are often hard to rationalize by standard theory and frequently appear sub-optimal. A key reason may be that people are unable to map the cost-sharing features of plans to their distribution of financial consequences. We develop and experimentally test a decision aid that provides this mapping to simplify comparisons of plan options. In two experiments mirroring typical health insurance decisions, we find that when people choose plans using standard feature-based information, they violate dominance at high rates. Our distribution-based decision aid substantially reduces dominance violations, and also changes choice patterns in situations where there is no dominant option. Choice patterns under feature-based menus can be most easily rationalized by models of heuristic choices, such as minimizing premium or deductible. With the decision aid, though, significantly more people have choice patterns that are better explained by expected utility theory. We compare our distribution-based approach to an alternative of providing estimates of the expected value of costs, which is the most common decision-support available in most insurance markets. Providing expected values affects choices in a similar direction as our consequence-based approach, but in a more muted fashion, and is only about half as effective at reducing dominance violations.
28003.zh_abstract: 保险选择通常难以用标准理论合理化，并且经常显得次优。一个关键原因可能是人们无法将计划的成本分摊特征映射到其财务后果的分布上。我们开发并实验测试了一种决策辅助工具，该工具提供了这种映射，以简化计划选项的比较。在两项模拟典型健康保险决策的实验中，我们发现，当人们使用基于标准特征的信息选择计划时，他们以高比率违反优势原则。我们的基于分布的决策辅助工具显著减少了优势违反，并且在没有主导选项的情况下也改变了选择模式。基于特征菜单下的选择模式最容易通过启发式选择模型（如最小化保费或免赔额）来合理化。然而，有了决策辅助工具，显著更多人的选择模式能更好地由预期效用理论解释。我们将基于分布的方法与提供成本预期值估计的替代方法进行比较，后者是大多数保险市场中最常见的决策支持。提供预期值对选择的影响方向与我们的基于后果的方法相似，但影响更为温和，并且在减少优势违反方面的效果仅约为后者的一半。

28002.title: r Minus g
28002.abstract: Long-term data show that the dynamic efficiency condition `r>g` holds when `g` is represented by the average growth rate of real GDP if `r` is the average real rate of return on equity, `E(r^e)`, but not if `r` is the risk-free rate, `r^f`. This pattern accords with a simple disaster-risk model calibrated to fit observed equity premia. If Ponzi (chain-letter) finance by private agents and the government are precluded, the equilibrium can feature `r^f≤E(g)`, a result that does not signal dynamic inefficiency. In contrast, `E(r^e)>E(g)` is required for dynamic efficiency, implied by the model, and consistent with the data. The model satisfies Ricardian Equivalence because, without Ponzi finance by the government, a rise in safe assets from increased public debt is matched by an increase in the safe (that is, certain) present value of liabilities associated with net taxes.\n\n
28002.zh_abstract: 长期数据显示，当g以实际GDP平均增长率表示，且r为权益平均实际回报率E(r^e)时，动态效率条件“r>g”成立；但如果r为无风险利率r^f，则不成立。这一模式符合一个简单的灾难风险模型，该模型经过校准以拟合观察到的股权溢价。如果禁止私人主体和政府进行庞氏（连锁信）融资，均衡可能呈现r^f≤E(g)的特征，这一结果并不表明动态无效率。相比之下，动态效率要求E(r^e)>E(g)，这由模型隐含且与数据一致。该模型满足李嘉图等价，因为在没有政府庞氏融资的情况下，公共债务增加带来的安全资产上升，与净税收相关负债的安全（即确定的）现值增加相匹配。

28001.title: Searching for the Equity Premium
28001.abstract: Labor market frictions are crucial for the equity premium in production economies. A dynamic stochastic general equilibrium model with recursive utility, search frictions, and capital accumulation yields a high equity premium of 4.26% per annum, a stock market volatility of 11.8%, and a low average interest rate of 1.59%, while simultaneously retaining plausible business cycle dynamics. The equity premium and stock market volatility are strongly countercyclical, while the interest rate and consumption growth are largely unpredictable. Because of wage inertia, dividends are procyclical despite consumption smoothing via capital investment. The welfare cost of business cycles is huge, 29%.
28001.zh_abstract: 劳动力市场摩擦对于生产经济中的股权溢价至关重要。一个具有递归效用、搜索摩擦和资本积累的动态随机一般均衡模型，产生了每年4.26%的高股权溢价、11.8%的股市波动率和1.59%的低平均利率，同时保持了合理的商业周期动态。股权溢价和股市波动率呈现强烈的逆周期性，而利率和消费增长在很大程度上不可预测。由于工资惯性，尽管通过资本投资进行消费平滑，股息仍呈顺周期性。商业周期的福利成本巨大，达到29%。
28001.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, LS, ME；JEL：E32, E44, G12

28000.title: Industrial Clusters, Networks and Resilience to the Covid-19 Shock in China
28000.zh_title: 产业集群、网络与中国对COVID-19冲击的韧性
28000.authors: Ruochen Dai, Dilip Mookherjee, Yingyue Quan, Xiaobo Zhang
28000.abstract: We examine how exposure of Chinese firms to the Covid-19 shock varied with a cluster index (measuring spatial agglomeration of firms in related industries) at the county level. Two data sources are used: entry flows of newly registered firms in the entire country, and an entrepreneur survey regarding operation of existing firms. Both show greater resilience in counties with a higher cluster index, after controlling for industry dummies and local infection rates, besides county and time dummies in the entry data. Reliance of clusters on informal entrepreneur hometown networks and closer proximity to suppliers and customers help explain these findings.
28000.zh_abstract: 我们考察了中国企业受COVID-19冲击的程度如何随县级集群指数（衡量相关行业企业空间集聚程度的指标）而变化。使用了两个数据来源：全国新注册企业的进入流量，以及关于现有企业运营的企业家调查。在控制行业虚拟变量和本地感染率，以及进入数据中的县和时间虚拟变量后，两者均显示集群指数较高的县具有更强的韧性。集群对非正式企业家同乡网络的依赖以及与供应商和客户更近的距离有助于解释这些发现。

28044.title: Political Polarization and Expected Economic Outcomes
28044.zh_title: 政治极化与预期经济结果
28044.authors: Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Michael Weber
28044.abstract: We use a large-scale representative survey of households from October 19-21 that elicits respondents’ expectations about the presidential election’s outcome as well as their economic expectations to document several new facts. First, people disagree strongly about the likely outcome of the election, despite widespread publicly available polling information. Most Democrats are very confident in a Biden win while most Republicans are very confident in a Trump win. Second, respondents predict a fairly rosy economic scenario if their preferred candidate wins but a dire one if the other candidate wins. Since most respondents are confident in their favored outcome, unconditional forecasts are similar across parties despite the fact that underlying probability distributions and conditional forecasts are very different. Third, when presented with recent polling data, most voters change their views by little unless they are independent and/or have relatively weak priors about the outcome. Information that emphasizes the uncertainty in polling data has larger effects in terms of reducing polarization in expected probabilities over different electoral outcomes. Fourth, exogenous information that changes individuals’ probability distribution over electoral outcomes also changes their unconditional forecasts in a corresponding manner. These changes in economic expectations in turn are likely to affect household economic decisions.
28044.zh_abstract: 我们利用10月19日至21日进行的一项大规模代表性家庭调查，该调查收集了受访者对总统选举结果的预期以及他们的经济预期，以记录几个新事实。首先，尽管存在广泛公开的民调信息，但人们对选举的可能结果存在严重分歧。大多数民主党人非常有信心拜登会赢，而大多数共和党人则非常有信心特朗普会赢。其次，受访者预测，如果他们偏好的候选人获胜，经济前景将相当乐观；但如果另一位候选人获胜，经济前景则十分严峻。由于大多数受访者对自己偏好的结果充满信心，尽管潜在的概率分布和条件预测差异很大，但两党的无条件预测却相似。第三，当看到最近的民调数据时，大多数选民的观点几乎没有改变，除非他们是独立选民和/或对选举结果持有相对较弱的先验信念。强调民调数据不确定性的信息在减少不同选举结果预期概率的极化方面效果更大。第四，改变个人对选举结果概率分布的外生信息也会相应地改变他们的无条件预测。这些经济预期的变化反过来又可能影响家庭的经济决策。

28043.title: Making Rallies Great Again: The Effects of Presidential Campaign Rallies on Voter Behavior, 2008-2016
28043.zh_title: 让集会再次伟大：2008-2016年总统竞选集会对选民行为的影响
28043.authors: James M. Snyder Jr., Hasin Yousaf
28043.abstract: Populism has surged around the world in recent decades. One campaign activity that may be especially important for populist leaders is holding large rallies to gain unmediated support from "the people." In this paper, we explore whether populist leaders are particularly effective in gaining support via their rallies. We do this by studying the effect of campaign rallies held by Donald Trump and other U.S. Presidential candidates since 2008. To measure the short-run causal impact of rallies, we exploit the fact that some respondents in the CCES were surveyed a few days before a rally, while others were surveyed a few days afterwards. We find that Trump's rallies produced a short-lived increase in his support over Clinton (especially among leaning Republicans), intention to vote (especially among strong Republicans), and individual campaign contributions for him. We do not find consistent, robust effects for other candidates. In terms of channels, we find that local media coverage of all candidates increased around their rallies, suggesting that the quantity of media coverage alone does not explain the findings.
28043.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，民粹主义在全球范围内兴起。对于民粹主义领导人来说，一项可能特别重要的竞选活动是举行大型集会，以获得来自“人民”的未经中介的支持。在本文中，我们探讨民粹主义领导人是否特别擅长通过集会获得支持。我们通过研究自2008年以来唐纳德·特朗普和其他美国总统候选人举行的竞选集会的效果来做到这一点。为了衡量集会的短期因果影响，我们利用了CCES中一些受访者在集会前几天接受调查，而另一些则在集会后几天接受调查这一事实。我们发现，特朗普的集会使他对克林顿的支持率（尤其是在倾向共和党人中）、投票意愿（尤其是在坚定共和党人中）以及个人竞选捐款出现了短暂增长。我们没有发现其他候选人有一致、稳健的效果。在传导渠道方面，我们发现所有候选人的地方媒体报道在其集会前后都有所增加，这表明仅凭媒体报道的数量并不能解释这些发现。

28042.title: Using Divide and Conquer to Improve Tax Collection: Theory and Laboratory Evidence
28042.zh_title: 利用分而治之策略改善税收征管：理论与实验室证据
28042.authors: Sylvain Chassang, Lucia Del Carpio, Samuel Kapon
28042.abstract: We consider a government collecting taxes from a large number of tax-payers using limited enforcement capacity. Under random enforcement, limited capacity results in multiple equilibria: if most agents comply, limited enforcement is sufficient to dissuade individual misbehavior; if most agents do not comply, enforcement capacity is over-stretched and fails to dissuade misbehavior. In settings without behavioral frictions, prioritized enforcement strategies can implement high collection as the unique rationalizable outcome. We investigate both theoretically and experimentally the extent to which this insight extends to environments with incomplete information and bounded rationality.
28042.zh_abstract: 我们考虑一个政府利用有限的执法能力向大量纳税人征税。在随机执法下，有限的能力会导致多重均衡：如果大多数纳税人遵守，有限的执法就足以阻止个人的违规行为；如果大多数纳税人不遵守，执法能力就会过度紧张，无法阻止违规行为。在没有行为摩擦的环境中，优先执法策略可以将高遵从度作为唯一可理性化的结果来实现。我们从理论和实验两方面研究了这一见解在多大程度上可以扩展到信息不完全和有限理性的环境中。
28042.meta: Programs：DEV, LE, PE, POL；JEL：C72, C73, C92, D73, D82, D86, H26

28041.title: Employment Effects of the Earned Income Tax Credit: Taking the Long View
28041.zh_title: 劳动所得税抵免的就业效应：长远视角
28041.authors: Diane Whitmore Schanzenbach, Michael R. Strain
28041.abstract: The Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC) is the cornerstone U.S. anti-poverty program for families with children, typically lifting millions of children out of poverty each year. Targeted to low-income households with children, and only available to those who work, the EITC contains strong incentives for non-workers to become employed. Most of the existing economics literature focuses on federal EITC expansions in the 1980s and 1990s. This paper takes a longer view, studying all federal expansions since the program’s inception in 1975. We find robust evidence that EITC expansions increase the extensive margin of labor supply.
28041.zh_abstract: 劳动所得税抵免（EITC）是美国针对有子女家庭的反贫困计划的基石，通常每年使数百万儿童摆脱贫困。EITC针对有子女的低收入家庭，并且仅适用于有工作者，它为不工作者提供了强烈的就业激励。现有的大部分经济学文献关注的是20世纪80年代和90年代联邦EITC的扩张。本文采取更长远视角，研究自1975年该计划创立以来所有联邦扩张的影响。我们发现了强有力的证据表明，EITC扩张增加了劳动供给的广延边际。

28040.title: Promoting Parental Involvement in Schools: Evidence From Two Randomized Experiments
28040.zh_title: 促进家长参与学校：来自两项随机实验的证据
28040.authors: Felipe Barrera-Osorio, Paul Gertler, Nozomi Nakajima, Harry Patrinos
28040.abstract: Parental involvement programs aim to increase school-and-parent communication and support children’s overall learning environment. This paper examines the effects of low-cost, group-based parental involvement interventions in Mexico using data from two randomized controlled trials. The first experiment provided financial resources to parent associations. The second experiment provided information to parents about how to support their children’s learning. Overall, the interventions induced different types of parental engagement in schools. The information intervention changed parenting behavior at home – with large effects among indigenous parents who have historically been discriminated and socially excluded – and improved student behavior in school. The grants did not impact parent or student behaviors. Notably, we do not find impacts of either intervention on educational achievement. To understand these null effects, we explore how social ties between parents and teachers evolved over the course of the two interventions. Parental involvement interventions led to significant changes in perceived trustworthiness between teachers and parents. The results suggest that parental involvement interventions can backfire if institutional rules are unclear about the expectations of parents and teachers as parents increase their involvement in schools.
28040.zh_abstract: 家长参与项目旨在增加学校与家长的沟通，并支持儿童的整体学习环境。本文利用两项随机对照试验的数据，研究了墨西哥低成本、基于群体的家长参与干预措施的效果。第一个实验为家长协会提供了财政资源。第二个实验向家长提供了关于如何支持子女学习的信息。总体而言，这些干预措施引发了不同类型的家长参与学校的行为。信息干预改变了家长在家中的养育行为——对历史上曾遭受歧视和社会排斥的土著家长影响显著——并改善了学生在校的行为。拨款并未影响家长或学生的行为。值得注意的是，我们没有发现任何一种干预措施对学业成绩有影响。为了理解这些无效结果，我们探讨了在两项干预过程中家长与教师之间的社会联系是如何演变的。家长参与干预措施导致教师和家长之间感知到的可信度发生了显著变化。结果表明，如果制度规则对家长和教师的期望不明确，随着家长增加对学校的参与，家长参与干预措施可能会适得其反。

28039.title: Refinancing, Monetary Policy, and the Credit Cycle
28039.zh_title: 再融资、货币政策与信贷周期
28039.authors: Gene Amromin, Neil Bhutta, Benjamin J. Keys
28039.abstract: We assess the complicated reality of monetary policy transmission through mortgage markets by synthesizing the existing literature on the role of refinancing in policy implementation. After briefly reviewing mortgage market institutions in the U.S. and documenting refinance activity over time, we summarize the links between refinancing and consumption, and describe the frictions impeding the refinancing channel. The paper draws heavily on research emerging from the experience of the financial crisis of 2008-09, as it highlights a combination of market, institutional, and policy-making factors that dulled the transmission mechanism. We conclude with a discussion of potential mortgage market innovations, and the applicability of lessons learned to the ongoing stresses induced by the COVID-19 pandemic.
28039.zh_abstract: 我们通过综合现有关于再融资在政策实施中作用的文献，评估了货币政策通过抵押贷款市场传导的复杂现实。在简要回顾美国抵押贷款市场制度并记录随时间变化的再融资活动后，我们总结了再融资与消费之间的联系，并描述了阻碍再融资渠道的摩擦。本文大量借鉴了从2008-09年金融危机经验中涌现的研究，因为它突显了市场、制度和政策制定因素的组合，这些因素削弱了传导机制。最后，我们讨论了潜在的抵押贷款市场创新，以及所学经验教训对COVID-19大流行所引发的持续压力的适用性。
28039.meta: Programs：EH, ME, PE；JEL：D12, D14, E50, G21, G51, R31

28038.title: Who Benefits from Analyst “Top Picks”?
28038.zh_title: 谁从分析师的“首选股”中受益？
28038.authors: Justin Birru, Sinan Gokkaya, Xi Liu, René M. Stulz
28038.abstract: Following the Global Settlement, analysts extensively use a top pick designation to highlight their highest conviction best ideas. Such a designation enables analysts to provide greater granularity of information, but it can potentially be influenced by conflicts of interest. Examining a comprehensive sample of top picks, we find, even though top picks are more likely to be investment banking clients, they have greater investment value, attract greater media and investor attention, and lead to more trading than buy recommendations. Bad top picks are more likely to be influenced by strategic objectives and have adverse consequences for analysts. Institutions, but not retail investors, discern between good and bad top picks.
28038.zh_abstract: 在全球和解之后，分析师广泛使用“首选股”标签来突出他们最具信心的最佳投资理念。这种标签使分析师能够提供更细粒度的信息，但它可能受到利益冲突的影响。通过检查一个全面的首选股样本，我们发现，尽管首选股更可能是投资银行客户，但它们比买入推荐具有更大的投资价值，吸引更多的媒体和投资者关注，并导致更多的交易。糟糕的首选股更可能受到战略目标的影响，并对分析师产生不利后果。机构投资者（而非散户投资者）能够辨别好的和坏的首选股。
28038.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：G11, G12, G14, G20, G23, G24

28037.title: The Age Profile of Life-satisfaction After Age 65 in the U.S.
28037.zh_title: 美国65岁后生活满意度的年龄分布
28037.authors: Péter Hudomiet, Michael D. Hurd, Susann Rohwedder
28037.abstract: Although income and wealth are frequently used as indicators of well-being, they are increasingly augmented with subjective measures such as life satisfaction to capture broader dimensions of individuals’ well-being. Based on data from large surveys of individuals, life satisfaction in cross-section increases with age beyond retirement into advanced old age. It may seem puzzling that average life satisfaction would be higher at older ages because older individuals are more likely to experience chronic or acute health conditions, or the loss of a spouse. Accordingly, this empirical pattern has been called the “paradox of well-being.” We examine the age profile of life satisfaction of the U.S. population age 65 and older in the Health and Retirement Study (HRS) and also find increasing life satisfaction at older ages in cross-section. But based on the longitudinal dimension of the HRS life satisfaction significantly declines with age and the rate of decline accelerates with age. Widowing and health shocks play important roles in this decline. We reconcile the cross-section and longitudinal measurements by showing that both differential mortality and differential non-response bias the cross-sectional age profile upward: individuals with higher life satisfaction and in better health tend to live longer and to remain in the survey, causing average values to increase. We conclude that the optimistic view about increasing life satisfaction at older ages based on cross-sectional data is not warranted.
28037.zh_abstract: 尽管收入和财富经常被用作福祉指标，但它们越来越多地被生活满意度等主观测量指标所补充，以捕捉个人福祉的更广泛维度。基于大型个人调查数据，横截面上的生活满意度在退休后随着年龄增长而增加，直至高龄。平均生活满意度在更年长时更高似乎令人费解，因为年长者更可能经历慢性或急性健康状况，或丧偶。因此，这种经验模式被称为“福祉悖论”。我们利用健康与退休研究（HRS）考察了美国65岁及以上人口生活满意度的年龄分布，并在横截面数据中也发现年长者的生活满意度在增加。但基于HRS的纵向维度，生活满意度随年龄增长显著下降，且下降速度随年龄增长而加快。丧偶和健康冲击在这一下降中扮演了重要角色。我们通过证明差异性死亡率和差异性无应答偏差都使横截面年龄分布向上偏斜，来调和横截面与纵向测量的差异：生活满意度更高、健康状况更好的个体往往活得更久并留在调查中，导致平均值上升。我们得出结论，基于横截面数据得出的关于年长者生活满意度上升的乐观观点是没有根据的。

28036.title: Affective Polarization Did Not Increase During the Coronavirus Pandemic
28036.zh_title: 新冠疫情期间情感极化并未加剧
28036.authors: Levi Boxell, Jacob Conway, James N. Druckman, Matthew Gentzkow
28036.abstract: We document trends in affective polarization during the coronavirus pandemic. In our main measure, affective polarization is relatively flat between July 2019 and February 2020, then falls significantly around the onset of the pandemic. Two other data sources show no evidence of an increase in polarization around the onset of the pandemic. Finally, we show in an experiment that priming respondents to think about the coronavirus pandemic significantly reduces affective polarization.
28036.zh_abstract: 我们记录了新冠疫情期间情感极化的趋势。在我们的主要衡量指标中，情感极化在2019年7月至2020年2月期间相对平稳，随后在疫情爆发前后显著下降。另外两个数据来源显示，疫情爆发前后没有出现极化加剧的证据。最后，我们在实验中表明，引导受访者思考新冠疫情会显著降低情感极化。

28035.title: Russian Holidays Predict Troll Activity 2015-2017
28035.zh_title: 俄罗斯节假日预测2015-2017年网络水军活动
28035.authors: Douglas Almond, Xinming Du, Alana Vogel
28035.abstract: While international election interference is not new, Russia is credited with “industrializing” trolling on English-language social media platforms. In October 2018, Twitter retrospectively identified 2.9 million English-language tweets as covertly written by trolls from Russia's Internet Research Agency. Most active 2015-2017, these Russian trolls generally supported the Trump campaign (Senate Intelligence Committee, 2019) and researchers have traced how this content disseminated across Twitter. Here, we take a different tack and seek exogenous drivers of Russian troll activity. We find that trolling fell 35% on Russian holidays and to a lesser extent, when temperatures were cold in St. Petersburg. More recent trolls released by Twitter do not show any systematic relationship to holidays and temperature, although substantially fewer of these that have been made public to date. Our finding for the pre-2018 interference period may furnish a natural experiment for evaluating the causal effect of Russian trolling on indirectly-affected outcomes and political behaviors — outcomes that are less traceable to troll content and potentially more important to policymakers than the direct dissemination activities previously studied. As a case in point, we describe suggestive evidence that Russian holidays impacted daily trading prices in 2016 election betting markets.
28035.zh_abstract: 尽管国际选举干预并非新鲜事，但俄罗斯被认为在英语社交媒体平台上将网络水军活动“工业化”。2018年10月，推特追溯识别出290万条英语推文是由俄罗斯互联网研究机构的水军秘密撰写的。这些俄罗斯水军在2015-2017年最为活跃，普遍支持特朗普竞选活动（参议院情报委员会，2019年），研究人员已追踪了这些内容在推特上的传播方式。在此，我们采取不同思路，寻找俄罗斯水军活动的外生驱动因素。我们发现，在俄罗斯节假日期间，水军活动下降了35%，在圣彼得堡气温较低时下降幅度较小。推特后来发布的水军数据未显示与节假日和气温存在系统性关系，尽管迄今为止公开的这些数据数量要少得多。我们对2018年前干预时期的发现，可能为评估俄罗斯水军活动对间接影响结果和政治行为的因果效应提供自然实验——这些结果比之前研究的直接传播活动更难以追溯到水军内容，且对政策制定者可能更为重要。作为例证，我们描述了暗示性证据：俄罗斯节假日影响了2016年选举博彩市场的每日交易价格。

28034.title: U.S. Robots and their Impacts in the Tropics: Evidence from Colombian Labor Markets
28034.zh_title: 美国机器人及其对热带地区的影响：来自哥伦比亚劳动力市场的证据
28034.authors: Adriana D. Kugler, Maurice Kugler, Laura Ripani, Rodimiro Rodrigo
28034.abstract: Previous studies for developed countries show negative short-run impacts of automation on employment and earnings. In this paper, we instead examine whether automation by a key trading partner can hurt workers in a developing country. We specifically focus in Colombia’s labor market, and how the automation in the U.S. impacts Colombian workers by replacing exports from Colombia for cheaper robot-made U.S. products. We use employer-employee matched data from the Colombian social security records combined with data on U.S. exposure to robots in different sectors from 2011 to 2016 to examine if robots in the U.S. are displacing workers in Colombia. We find that U.S. robots decrease employment and earnings for Colombian workers in those sectors of local labor markets that have high levels of automation -measured as robots per thousand workers- in the U.S. labor market. In terms of turnover, as expected, there is an increase in dismissals and a decrease in hires for workers in sectors highly impacted by robots in the U.S. Moreover, the negative displacement effects of robots are greater for women; older workers; workers employed in small and medium sized enterprises, and workers employed in manufacturing. Importantly, local labor markets which exported the most to the U.S. in the past, are also the most affected by the increased adoption of U.S. robots, suggesting that Colombian workers may be losing employment to automated jobs reshored back to the U.S. Our estimates suggest that during our period of analysis, the adoption of robots in the U.S. led to a cumulative loss of between 63,000 and 100,000 jobs in Colombia.
28034.zh_abstract: 先前对发达国家的研究显示，自动化对就业和收入有短期负面影响。本文转而考察主要贸易伙伴的自动化是否会损害发展中国家的工人。我们特别关注哥伦比亚劳动力市场，以及美国自动化如何通过用更便宜的机器人制造的美国产品替代哥伦比亚出口，从而影响哥伦比亚工人。我们使用2011年至2016年哥伦比亚社保记录中的雇主-雇员匹配数据，结合美国各行业机器人暴露数据，检验美国机器人是否正在取代哥伦比亚工人。我们发现，美国机器人降低了哥伦比亚工人在当地劳动力市场中那些美国劳动力市场自动化水平较高（以每千名工人机器人数量衡量）的行业的就业和收入。在人员流动方面，正如预期，受美国机器人影响较大的行业的工人解雇增加、招聘减少。此外，机器人的负面替代效应对女性、老年工人、中小型企业员工以及制造业工人更为显著。重要的是，过去对美出口最多的当地劳动力市场，也受到美国机器人采用增加的最严重影响，这表明哥伦比亚工人可能因自动化岗位回流美国而失去就业机会。我们的估计表明，在分析期间，美国机器人的采用导致哥伦比亚累计损失了6.3万至10万个工作岗位。
28034.meta: Programs：ITI, LS；JEL：C33, C36, F66, J21, J23, J63

28033.title: Who Married, (to) Whom, and Where? Trends in Marriage in the United States, 1850-1940
28033.zh_title: 谁与谁结婚，在哪里结婚？美国婚姻趋势，1850-1940
28033.authors: Claudia Olivetti, M. Daniele Paserman, Laura Salisbury, E. Anna Weber
28033.abstract: We present new findings about the relationship between marriage and socioeconomic background in the United States in the late 19th and early 20th Centuries. Imputing socioeconomic status of family of origin from first names, we document a socioeconomic gradient for women in the probability of marriage and the socioeconomic status of husbands. This socioeconomic gradient becomes steeper over time. We investigate the degree to which it can be explained by occupational income divergence across geographic regions. Regional divergence explains about one half of the socioeconomic divergence in the probability of marriage, and almost all of the increase in marital sorting. Differences in urbanization rates and the share of foreign-born across states drive most of these differences, while other factors (the scholarization rate, the sex ratio and the share in manufacturing) play a smaller role.
28033.zh_abstract: 我们提出了关于19世纪末20世纪初美国婚姻与社会经济背景关系的新发现。通过从名字中推算原生家庭的社会经济地位，我们记录了女性在结婚概率和丈夫社会经济地位方面的社会经济梯度。这种社会经济梯度随时间推移变得更加陡峭。我们研究了这种梯度在多大程度上可由地理区域间的职业收入差异解释。区域差异解释了结婚概率社会经济差异的大约一半，以及婚姻匹配度增加的几乎全部。各州间城市化率和外国出生人口比例的差异是这些差异的主要驱动因素，而其他因素（入学率、性别比和制造业就业份额）作用较小。
28033.meta: Programs：DAE, LS；JEL：J12, J62, N31, N32, N91, N92

28032.title: Has the Paycheck Protection Program Succeeded?
28032.zh_title: 薪资保护计划成功了吗？
28032.authors: R. Glenn Hubbard, Michael R. Strain
28032.abstract: Enacted March 27, 2020, the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) was the most ambitious and creative fiscal policy response to the Pandemic Recession in the United States. PPP offers forgivable loans — essentially grants — to businesses with 500 or fewer employees that meet certain requirements. In this paper, we present evidence that PPP has substantially increased the employment, financial health, and survival of small businesses, using data from the Dun & Bradstreet Corporation. We use event studies and standard difference-in-difference models to estimate the effect of a small business applying for larger PPP loans and of a small business being eligible for PPP based on size. While our findings are informative, we believe it is too early to issue conclusive judgment on PPP’s success. We offer lessons for the future from the PPP experience thus far.
28032.zh_abstract: 2020年3月27日颁布的薪资保护计划（PPP）是美国应对疫情衰退最具雄心和创意的财政政策。PPP向符合特定条件的500名及以下员工企业提供可豁免贷款——实质上是赠款。本文利用邓白氏公司的数据，提供证据表明PPP显著提高了小企业的就业、财务健康和生存率。我们使用事件研究和标准双重差分模型，估计小企业申请较大额PPP贷款以及小企业基于规模符合PPP资格的影响。尽管我们的发现具有参考价值，但我们认为对PPP的成功做出最终判断还为时过早。我们根据迄今的PPP经验为未来提供启示。
28032.meta: Programs：EFG, ME, PE；JEL：E24, E62, H25, H3, H32

28031.title: Economic Benefits of COVID-19 Screening Tests
28031.authors: Andrew Atkeson, Michael C. Droste, Michael Mina, James H. Stock
28031.abstract: We assess the economic value of screening testing programs as a policy response to the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic. We find that the fiscal, macroeconomic, and health benefits of rapid SARS-CoV-2 screening testing programs far exceed their costs, with the ratio of economic benefits to costs typically in the range of 4-15 (depending on program details), not counting the monetized value of lives saved. Unless the screening test is highly specific, however, the signal value of the screening test alone is low, leading to concerns about adherence. Confirmatory testing increases the net economic benefits of screening tests by reducing the number of healthy workers in quarantine and by increasing adherence to quarantine measures. The analysis is undertaken using a behavioral SIR model for the United States with 5 age groups, 66 economic sectors, screening and diagnostic testing, and partial adherence to instructions to quarantine or to isolate.
28031.zh_abstract: 我们评估了筛查测试项目作为应对持续COVID-19疫情政策的经济价值。我们发现，快速SARS-CoV-2筛查测试项目的财政、宏观经济和健康效益远超其成本，经济效益与成本之比通常在4-15之间（取决于项目细节），这还不包括挽救生命的货币化价值。然而，除非筛查测试具有高度特异性，否则仅凭筛查测试的信号价值较低，会导致对依从性的担忧。确认性测试通过减少隔离中的健康工人数量并提高对隔离措施的依从性，增加了筛查测试的净经济效益。该分析采用针对美国的行为SIR模型进行，该模型包含5个年龄组、66个经济部门、筛查和诊断测试，以及对隔离或自我隔离指令的部分依从性。

28030.title: Private Equity and Growth
28030.authors: Boyan Jovanovic, Sai Ma, Peter L. Rousseau
28030.abstract: We study private equity in a dynamic general equilibrium model and ask two questions: (i) Why does the investment of venture funds respond more strongly to the business cycle than that of buyout funds? (ii) Why are venture funds returns higher than those of buyout? On (i), venture brings in new capital whereas buyout largely reorganizes existing capital; this can explain the stronger co-movement of venture with aggregate Tobin's Q. Regarding (ii), venture returns co-move more strongly with aggregate consumption and therefore pay a higher premium. Our model embodies this logic and fits the data on investment and returns well. At the estimated parameters, the two PE sectors together contribute between 14 and 21 percent of observed growth, relative to the extreme case where private equity is absent.
28030.zh_abstract: 我们在动态一般均衡模型中研究私募股权，并提出两个问题：（i）为什么风险投资基金的投资对商业周期的反应比收购基金更强？（ii）为什么风险基金的回报高于收购基金？关于（i），风险投资引入新资本，而收购主要重组现有资本；这可以解释风险投资与总体托宾Q值更强的联动性。关于（ii），风险投资回报与总体消费的联动性更强，因此支付更高的溢价。我们的模型体现了这一逻辑，并很好地拟合了投资和回报数据。在估计参数下，相对于私募股权完全缺失的极端情况，两个私募股权部门共同贡献了观察到的增长的14%至21%。

28029.title: The Market Risk Premium for Unsecured Consumer Credit Risk
28029.zh_title: 无担保消费信贷风险的市场风险溢价
28029.abstract: We use the prices of credit card asset-backed securities to study the market risk premium associated with unsecured consumer credit risk. The consumer credit risk premium has historically been comparable to high yield corporate bond spreads, but has increased dramatically since the financial crisis. We find evidence that this increase is primarily due to balance-sheet costs imposed by recent changes in regulatory capital requirements which have effectively placed credit card securitizations back onto issuer balance sheets. These changes in capital regulation may have added hundreds of basis points to the cost of unsecured household credit.
28029.zh_abstract: 我们利用信用卡资产支持证券的价格来研究无担保消费信贷风险的市场风险溢价。历史上，消费信贷风险溢价与高收益公司债券利差相当，但自金融危机以来大幅上升。我们发现证据表明，这一增长主要是由于近期监管资本要求变化带来的资产负债表成本，这些变化实际上将信用卡证券化重新放回了发行人的资产负债表上。这些资本监管的变化可能使无担保家庭信贷的成本增加了数百个基点。

28028.title: Retail Financial Innovation and Stock Market Dynamics: The Case of Target Date Funds
28028.zh_title: 零售金融创新与股票市场动态：以目标日期基金为例
28028.authors: Jonathan A. Parker, Antoinette Schoar, Yang Sun
28028.abstract: Target Date Funds (TDFs) are designed to provide unsophisticated or inattentive investors with age-appropriate exposures to different asset classes like stocks and bonds. The rise of TDFs has moved a significant share of retirement investors into macro-contrarian strategies that sell stocks after relatively good stock market performance. This rebalancing drives contrarian flows across equity mutual funds held by TDFs, stabilizing their funding, and reduces stock returns for stocks disproportionately held by these funds when stock market returns are relatively high. Continued growth in TDFs and similar investment products may dampen stock market volatility and increase the transmission of shocks across asset classes.
28028.zh_abstract: 目标日期基金（TDFs）旨在为不成熟或注意力不集中的投资者提供与年龄相适应的股票和债券等不同资产类别的敞口。TDFs的兴起使大量退休投资者转向宏观逆向策略，即在股票市场表现相对较好后卖出股票。这种再平衡导致TDFs持有的股票共同基金出现逆向资金流，稳定了其资金来源，并在股票市场回报相对较高时，降低了这些基金不成比例持有的股票的回报。TDFs及类似投资产品的持续增长可能会抑制股票市场波动，并增加冲击在不同资产类别之间的传导。
28028.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：G12, G23, G51

28027.title: Spillovers from Ancillary Services to Wholesale Energy Markets
28027.zh_title: 辅助服务对批发能源市场的溢出效应
28027.authors: Jesse F. Buchsbaum, Catherine Hausman, Johanna L. Mathieu, Jing Peng
28027.abstract: In electricity markets, generators are rewarded both for providing energy and for enabling grid reliability. The two functions are compensated with two separate payments: energy market payments and ancillary services market payments. We provide evidence of changes in the generation mix in the energy market that are driven by exogenous changes in an ancillary services market. We provide a theoretical framework and quasi-experimental evidence for understanding the mechanism, showing that it results from the multi-product nature of power plants combined with discontinuities in costs. Although research in economics typically focuses solely on the energy market, our results suggest that spillovers between markets are important as well. Furthermore, policy changes relating to grid operations, grid reliability, or climate change could have unintended effects.
28027.zh_abstract: 在电力市场中，发电商既因提供能源而获得奖励，也因确保电网可靠性而获得奖励。这两种功能通过两种独立的支付来补偿：能源市场支付和辅助服务市场支付。我们提供了证据，表明能源市场中发电组合的变化是由辅助服务市场的外生变化驱动的。我们提供了一个理论框架和准实验证据来理解这一机制，表明它源于发电厂的多产品特性与成本的不连续性。尽管经济学研究通常只关注能源市场，但我们的结果表明，市场之间的溢出效应也很重要。此外，与电网运营、电网可靠性或气候变化相关的政策变化可能会产生意想不到的后果。
28027.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：L21, L94, L98, Q42, Q48, Q53, Q58

28026.title: Structural Breaks in an Endogenous Growth Model
28026.zh_title: 内生增长模型中的结构突变
28026.abstract: We study the effects of parameter uncertainty prompted by structural breaks. In our model, agents respond differently to uncertainty prompted by regime shifts in shock processes than they react to comparable perceived increases in shock volatility. The magnitude of the response to an increase in uncertainty about TFP associated with a structural break is greater than that of a response to a comparable perceived rise in volatility. This is because lifetime utility varies more when shocks shift beliefs and perceived wealth.
28026.zh_abstract: 我们研究了由结构突变引发的参数不确定性的影响。在我们的模型中，对于由冲击过程中的制度转换所引发的不确定性，经济主体的反应不同于他们对可比较的感知到的冲击波动性上升的反应。与全要素生产率（TFP）相关的结构突变所引发的不确定性上升，其反应幅度大于对可比较的感知到的波动性上升的反应。这是因为当冲击改变信念和感知财富时，终身效用的变化更大。

28025.title: Mandatory Retirement for Judges Improved Performance on U.S. State Supreme Courts
28025.zh_title: 法官强制退休制度改善了美国州最高法院的表现
28025.abstract: Mandatory retirement for judges has often been considered as a policy response to an aging judicial workforce. This paper provides empirical evidence on how mandatory retirement influences judge performance using a wave of such reforms in U.S. state supreme courts as a natural experiment. We find that introducing mandatory retirement improves court performance as measured by output (number of published opinions) and legal influence (number of forward citations to those opinions). While older judges are cited less often than younger judges, the effect of mandatory retirement on performance is much larger than what would be expected from a change in the age distribution. We find some evidence that the additional effect is due to selective attrition and that the presence of older judges reduces the performance of younger judges.
28025.zh_abstract: 法官强制退休制度常被视为应对司法队伍老龄化的政策。本文利用美国州最高法院一波此类改革作为自然实验，提供了关于强制退休如何影响法官绩效的实证证据。我们发现，引入强制退休制度改善了法院的表现，这通过产出（已发表意见的数量）和法律影响力（这些意见的前向引用次数）来衡量。虽然年长法官被引用的次数少于年轻法官，但强制退休对绩效的影响远大于仅因年龄分布变化所预期的效果。我们找到一些证据表明，额外效应是由于选择性离职，并且年长法官的存在降低了年轻法官的绩效。
28025.meta: Programs：AG, LE, LS；JEL：D02, J26, J41, J44, K0, K4

28024.title: Uncertainty and Growth Disasters
28024.abstract: This paper documents several facts on the real effects of economic uncertainty. First, higher uncertainty is associated with a more dispersed distribution of output growth. Second, the relation is highly asymmetric: A rise in uncertainty is associated with a sharp decline in the lower tail of the growth distribution whereas it has a much smaller and insignificant impact on its upper tail. Third, the negative response of growth to uncertainty shocks is larger when the equity market is more volatile. We build a model in which growth and uncertainty are both endogenous: rapid adoption of new technology raises economic uncertainty and may cause measured productivity to decline. The equilibrium growth distribution is negatively skewed and higher uncertainty leads to a thicker left tail and to more labor reallocation among jobs and among
28024.zh_abstract: 本文记录了关于经济不确定性实际影响的几个事实。首先，更高的不确定性与更分散的产出增长分布相关。其次，这种关系高度不对称：不确定性上升与增长分布下尾的急剧下降相关，而对上尾的影响则小得多且不显著。第三，当股票市场波动性更大时，增长对不确定性冲击的负面反应更大。我们构建了一个增长和不确定性都是内生的模型：新技术的快速采用提高了经济不确定性，并可能导致测度的生产率下降。均衡增长分布是负偏态的，更高的不确定性导致左尾更厚，并导致工作和职业间更多的劳动力重新配置。

28023.title: Data Sharing and Market Power with Two-Sided Platforms
28023.zh_title: 双边平台的数据共享与市场势力
28023.abstract: We study an economy in which consumers and merchants (sellers) interact on a two-sided platform. Consumers can share data about their tastes for different varieties of a single good with the platform which in turn sells this data to merchants. Data sharing increases gains from trade by improving match quality but gives more market power to the platform relative to the merchants which can reduce entry and consequently consumer welfare. This leads to an externality not internalized by consumers thus leading to more data sharing than is efﬁcient. We highlight two reasons why more precise information increases the market power of the platform. The ﬁrst is a copycat (private label) externality that increases the outside option for the platform of selling the good directly to consumers. The second is a consumer access externality that reduces the outside option of the merchants when information gets more precise, as more buyers are able to ﬁnd their desired variety on the platform. Our model explains the qualitative differences between traditional retail platforms (physical stores) and digital online platforms and why the latter are more likely to require regulatory interventions that the former.
28023.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个消费者和商家（卖方）在双边平台上互动的经济。消费者可以将其对不同种类单一商品偏好的数据与平台共享，平台随后将这些数据出售给商家。数据共享通过提高匹配质量增加了交易收益，但相对于商家而言，赋予了平台更多的市场势力，这可能会减少进入并因此降低消费者福利。这导致了一种未被消费者内部化的外部性，从而导致数据共享超过有效水平。我们强调了更精确的信息增加平台市场势力的两个原因。第一个是模仿（自有品牌）外部性，它增加了平台直接向消费者销售商品的外部选择。第二个是消费者接入外部性，当信息变得更精确时，它降低了商家的外部选择，因为更多买家能够在平台上找到他们想要的品种。我们的模型解释了传统零售平台（实体店）与数字在线平台之间的定性差异，以及为什么后者比前者更可能需要监管干预。
28023.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IO；JEL：D2, D4, D42, D43, L11, L12

28022.title: Learning During the COVID-19 Pandemic: It Is Not Who You Teach, but How You Teach
28022.zh_title: COVID-19疫情期间的学习：关键不在于教谁，而在于如何教
28022.authors: George Orlov, Douglas McKee, James Berry, Austin Boyle, Thomas DiCiccio, Tyler Ransom, Alex Rees-Jones, Jörg Stoye
28022.abstract: We use standardized end-of-course knowledge assessments to examine student learning during the disruptions induced by the COVID-19 pandemic. Examining seven economics courses taught at four US R1 institutions, we find that students performed substantially worse, on average, in Spring 2020 when compared to Spring or Fall 2019. We find no evidence that the effect was driven by specific demographic groups. However, our results suggest that teaching methods that encourage active engagement, such as the use of small group activities and projects, played an important role in mitigating this negative effect. Our results point to methods for more effective online teaching as the pandemic continues.
28022.zh_abstract: 我们使用标准化的课程结束知识评估来考察COVID-19大流行导致的干扰期间学生的学习情况。通过考察在美国四所R1机构教授的七门经济学课程，我们发现，与2019年春季或秋季相比，学生在2020年春季的平均表现明显更差。我们没有发现证据表明这种影响是由特定人口群体驱动的。然而，我们的结果表明，鼓励积极参与的教学方法，例如使用小组活动和项目，在减轻这种负面影响方面发挥了重要作用。随着疫情的持续，我们的结果为更有效的在线教学指出了方法。

28021.title: Fintech Borrowers: Lax-Screening or Cream-Skimming?
28021.zh_title: 金融科技借款人：宽松筛选还是摘樱桃？
28021.abstract: We study the personal credit market using unique individual-level data covering fintech and traditional lenders. We show that fintech lenders acquire market share by first lending to higher-risk borrowers and then to safer borrowers, and mainly rely on hard information to make credit decisions. Fintech borrowers are significantly more likely to default than neighbor individuals with the same characteristics borrowing from traditional financial institutions. Furthermore, they tend to experience only a short- lived reduction in the cost of credit, because their indebtedness increases more than non-fintech borrowers a few months after loan origination. However, fintech lenders' pricing strategies are likely to take this into account.
28021.zh_abstract: 我们利用涵盖金融科技和传统贷款机构的独特个人层面数据研究个人信贷市场。我们表明，金融科技贷款机构通过首先向高风险借款人放贷，然后向更安全的借款人放贷来获取市场份额，并且主要依赖硬信息来做出信贷决策。金融科技借款人比具有相同特征、从传统金融机构借款的邻近个人更有可能违约。此外，他们往往只会经历短暂的信贷成本降低，因为在贷款发放几个月后，他们的负债比非金融科技借款人增加得更多。然而，金融科技贷款机构的定价策略很可能考虑到了这一点。

28020.title: Is There Too Much Benchmarking in Asset Management?
28020.zh_title: 资产管理中是否存在过度基准化？
28020.authors: Anil K Kashyap, Natalia Kovrijnykh, Jian Li, Anna Pavlova
28020.abstract: We propose a tractable model of asset management in which benchmarking arises endogenously, and analyze its unintended welfare consequences. Fund managers’ portfolios are not contractible and they incur private costs in running them. Incentive contracts for fund managers create a pecuniary externality through their effect on asset prices. Benchmarking inflates asset prices and creates crowded trades. The crowding reduces the effectiveness of benchmarking in incentive contracts for others, which fund investors fail to account for. A social planner, recognizing the crowding, opts for contracts with less benchmarking and less incentive provision. The planner also delivers lower asset management costs.
28020.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个易于处理的资产管理模型，其中基准化是内生的，并分析了其非预期的福利后果。基金经理的投资组合不可契约化，且他们在管理投资组合时承担私人成本。基金经理的激励合同通过影响资产价格产生货币外部性。基准化推高了资产价格并导致拥挤交易。这种拥挤降低了基准化在他人激励合同中的有效性，而基金投资者未能考虑到这一点。认识到拥挤问题的社会规划者会选择基准化程度较低、激励提供较少的合同。规划者还能降低资产管理成本。
28020.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：D82, D86, G11, G12, G23

28019.title: Idea Diffusion and Property Rights
28019.abstract: We study innovation and diffusion of technology at the industry level. We derive an industry's evolution, from birth to its maturity, and we characterize how diffusion affects the incentive to innovate. The model implies that pro­tection of innovators should be only partial due to the matching externality in the meetings in which idea transfers take place. The model also shows that enhancing idea diffusion is socially beneficial and can generate industry over­taking patterns endogenously. We fit the model to the early experiences of the U.S. automobile and personal computer industries and quantify the theoretical predictions.
28019.zh_abstract: 我们研究了行业层面的创新与技术扩散。我们推导了一个行业从诞生到成熟的发展过程，并刻画了扩散如何影响创新激励。该模型表明，由于创意转移发生的会面中存在匹配外部性，对创新者的保护应仅为部分性的。模型还显示，增强创意扩散对社会有益，并能内生地产生行业赶超模式。我们将模型拟合到美国汽车和个人电脑行业的早期经验，并量化了理论预测。

28018.title: Hospital Allocation and Racial Disparities in Health Care
28018.zh_title: 医院分配与医疗保健中的种族差异
28018.authors: Amitabh Chandra, Pragya Kakani, Adam Sacarny
28018.abstract: We develop a simple framework to measure the role of hospital allocation in racial disparities in health care and use it to study Black and white Medicare patients who are treated for heart attacks – a condition where virtually everyone receives care, hospital care is highly effective, and hospital quality has been validated. We report four facts. (1) Black patients receive care at lower-performing hospitals than white patients, even when they live in the same hospital market or ZIP code within a hospital market. (2) Over the past two decades, the gap in performance between hospitals treating Black and white patients shrank by over two-thirds. (3) This progress is due to more rapid performance improvement at hospitals that tended to treat Black patients, rather than faster reallocation of Black patients to better hospitals. (4) Hospital performance improvement is correlated with adoption of a high-return low-cost input, beta-blockers. Closing remaining disparities in allocation and harnessing the forces of performance improvement, including technology diffusion, may be novel levers to further reduce disparities.
28018.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个简单框架来衡量医院分配在医疗保健种族差异中的作用，并利用它来研究因心脏病发作接受治疗的黑人和白人医疗保险患者——这是一种几乎所有人都接受治疗、医院护理高效且医院质量已得到验证的疾病。我们报告了四个事实。（1）即使在同一个医院市场或同一个医院市场内的邮政编码区，黑人患者也比白人患者在绩效更低的医院接受治疗。（2）在过去二十年中，治疗黑人和白人患者的医院之间的绩效差距缩小了三分之二以上。（3）这一进展是由于倾向于治疗黑人患者的医院绩效改善更快，而非黑人患者更快地重新分配到更好的医院。（4）医院绩效改善与采用高回报低成本投入物β受体阻滞剂相关。缩小分配中剩余的差距以及利用绩效改善的力量（包括技术扩散），可能是进一步减少差异的新杠杆。

28017.title: Obsolescence of Capital and Investment Spikes
28017.abstract: The prospect of capital obsolescence inhibits investment. Investors thus become more optimistic when the obsolescence of their capital slows down. We propose a model with no fixed costs of investment, and random technological progress that induces obsolescence of capital in place. Spikes occur precisely when technological progress slows down. Moreover, the more variable the progress, the larger are the spikes. Cross-industry data show that where price of capital declines are more variable, investment spikes are larger.
28017.zh_abstract: 资本过时的前景抑制了投资。因此，当投资者资本的过时速度放缓时，他们会变得更加乐观。我们提出了一个模型，该模型没有固定投资成本，并且随机的技术进步会导致现有资本过时。投资尖峰恰好发生在技术进步放缓时。此外，技术进步的变化越大，投资尖峰就越大。跨行业数据显示，在资本价格下降变化更大的行业中，投资尖峰也更大。

28016.title: Adverse Selection Dynamics in Privately-Produced Safe Debt Markets
28016.zh_title: 私人生产的安全债务市场中的逆向选择动态
28016.authors: Nathan Foley-Fisher, Gary B. Gorton, Stéphane Verani
28016.abstract: Privately-produced safe debt is designed so that there is no adverse selection in trade. This is because no agent finds it profitable to produce private information about the debt’s backing and all agents know this (i.e., it is information-insensitive). But in some macro states, it becomes profitable for some agents to produce private information, and then the debt faces adverse selection when traded (i.e., it becomes information-sensitive). We empirically study these adverse selection dynamics in a very important asset class, collateralized loan obligations, a large symbiotic appendage of the regulated banking system, which finances loans to below investment-grade firms.
28016.zh_abstract: 私人生产的安全债务被设计成在交易中不存在逆向选择。这是因为没有代理人发现生产关于债务支持的私人信息是有利可图的，并且所有代理人都知道这一点（即，它是信息不敏感的）。但在某些宏观状态下，一些代理人生产私人信息变得有利可图，此时债务在交易中面临逆向选择（即，它变得信息敏感）。我们实证研究了在一个非常重要的资产类别——担保贷款凭证（受监管银行体系的一个大型共生附属机构，为低于投资级的企业提供贷款融资）中的这些逆向选择动态。
28016.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E44, G14, G23

28015.title: Bury the Gold Standard? A Quantitative Exploration
28015.zh_title: 埋葬金本位？一项定量探索
28015.authors: Anthony M. Diercks, Jonathan Rawls, Eric Sims
28015.abstract: This paper is one of the first to study the present-day properties of the gold standard in a quantitative model commonly used in central banks. We incorporate gold into an otherwise standard estimated New Keynesian model and compare the positive and normative implications of adopting a gold standard to other more commonly advocated policies. We show that under certain conditions, the gold standard is akin to a nominal GDP targeting framework and can at times be considered an improvement. However, unlike more conventional policies, the gold standard must react to shocks to the supply and demand for gold. We estimate the model for the post-2000 period using a novel dataset on the supply of gold and find that following a gold standard would result in dramatic increases in the volatilities of macroeconomic aggregates and a significant deterioration in household welfare. This is because the estimated shocks to gold supply and demand are significantly larger than for other more conventional aggregate shocks. In the end, what buries the gold standard turns out to be instability in the dynamics of gold itself.
28015.zh_abstract: 本文是首批在中央银行常用的定量模型中研究金本位制当代特性的论文之一。我们将黄金纳入一个原本标准的新凯恩斯主义估计模型，并比较采用金本位制与其他更常被倡导的政策在实证和规范意义上的含义。我们表明，在某些条件下，金本位制类似于名义GDP目标框架，有时可被视为一种改进。然而，与更传统的政策不同，金本位制必须对黄金的供给和需求冲击做出反应。我们使用一个关于黄金供给的新数据集，对2000年后的时期进行了模型估计，发现遵循金本位制将导致宏观经济总量的波动性急剧增加，并显著恶化家庭福利。这是因为估计出的黄金供给和需求冲击远大于其他更传统的总体冲击。最终，埋葬金本位制的正是黄金自身动态的不稳定性。

28014.title: A Comparison of Monthly Global Indicators for Forecasting Growth
28014.zh_title: 用于预测增长的月度全球指标比较
28014.abstract: This paper evaluates the predictive content of a set of alternative monthly indicators of global economic activity for nowcasting and forecasting quarterly world GDP using mixed-frequency models. We find that a recently proposed indicator that covers multiple dimensions of the global economy consistently produces substantial improvements in forecast accuracy, while other monthly measures have more mixed success. This global economic conditions indicator contains valuable information also for assessing the current and future state of the economy for a set of individual countries and groups of countries. We use this indicator to track the evolution of the nowcasts for the US, the OECD area, and the world economy during the coronavirus pandemic and quantify the main factors driving the nowcasts.
28014.zh_abstract: 本文评估了一组替代性月度全球经济活动指标在利用混频模型进行季度世界GDP的即时预测和预测时的预测内容。我们发现，一个最近提出的涵盖全球经济多个维度的指标持续地大幅提高了预测准确性，而其他月度指标的成功程度则参差不齐。该全球经济状况指标对于评估一组特定国家和国家集团当前及未来的经济状况也包含有价值的信息。我们利用该指标追踪美国、经合组织地区和世界经济在新冠疫情期间即时预测的演变，并量化了驱动这些即时预测的主要因素。

28013.title: Rural-Urban Migration and House Prices in China
28013.authors: Carlos Garriga, Aaron Hedlund, Yang Tang, Ping Wang
28013.abstract: This paper uses a dynamic competitive spatial equilibrium framework to evaluate the contribution of rural-urban migration induced by structural transformation to the behavior of Chinese housing markets. In the model, technological progress drives workers facing heterogeneous mobility costs to migrate from the rural agricultural sector to the higher paying urban manufacturing sector. Upon arrival to the city, workers purchase housing using long-term mortgages. Quantitatively, the model fits cross-sectional house price behavior across a representative sample of Chinese cities between 2003 and 2015. The model is then used to evaluate how changes to city migration policies and land supply regulations affect the speed of urbanization and house price appreciation. The analysis indicates that making migration policy more egalitarian or land policy more uniform would promote urbanization but also would contribute to larger house price dispersion.
28013.zh_abstract: 本文利用一个动态竞争性空间均衡框架来评估由结构转型引发的城乡迁移对中国住房市场行为的贡献。在该模型中，技术进步驱动面临异质性迁移成本的工人从农村农业部门迁移到收入更高的城市制造业部门。到达城市后，工人使用长期抵押贷款购买住房。在定量上，该模型拟合了2003年至2015年间中国代表性城市样本的横截面房价行为。然后，利用该模型评估城市迁移政策和土地供应法规的变化如何影响城市化速度和房价上涨。分析表明，使迁移政策更加平等或土地政策更加统一将促进城市化，但也会导致更大的房价离散度。

28012.title: Nursing Home Quality, COVID-19 Deaths, and Excess Mortality
28012.zh_title: 养老院质量、COVID-19死亡与超额死亡率
28012.authors: Christopher J. Cronin, William N. Evans
28012.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic in the US has been particularly devastating for nursing home residents. A key question is how have some nursing homes been able to effectively protect their residents, while others have not? Using data on the universe of US nursing homes, we examine whether establishment quality is predictive of COVID-19 mortality. Higher-quality nursing homes, as measured by inspection ratings, have substantially lower COVID-19 mortality. Quality does not predict the ability to prevent any COVID-19 resident or staff cases, but higher-quality establishments prevent the spread of resident infections conditional on having one. Preventing COVID-19 cases and deaths may come at some cost, as high-quality homes have substantially higher non-COVID deaths, a result consistent with high excess non-COVID mortality among the elderly since March. The positive correlation between establishment quality and non-COVID mortality is driven entirely by nursing homes located in counties with below-median COVID-19 case rates. As a result, high-quality homes in these counties have significantly more total deaths than their low-quality counterparts. The concentration of excess death in low-risk areas suggests that future suffering could be avoided with more nuanced guidelines, such as those recently suggested by CMS that outline a role for in-person visits in lower-risk areas.
28012.zh_abstract: COVID-19疫情在美国对养老院居民造成了尤为严重的冲击。一个关键问题是，为何一些养老院能够有效保护其居民，而另一些却不能？利用美国所有养老院的数据，我们考察了机构质量是否能预测COVID-19死亡率。以检查评级衡量的更高质量养老院，其COVID-19死亡率显著更低。质量并不能预测避免任何居民或工作人员感染COVID-19的能力，但更高质量的机构在出现首例居民感染后，能够防止感染的扩散。预防COVID-19病例和死亡可能需付出一定代价，因为高质量养老院的非COVID死亡人数显著更高，这一结果与自3月以来老年人中非COVID超额死亡率较高的情况一致。机构质量与非COVID死亡率之间的正相关完全由位于COVID-19病例率低于中位数的县的养老院驱动。因此，这些县的高质量养老院的总死亡人数显著高于低质量养老院。超额死亡集中在低风险地区，这表明通过更细致的指导方针（例如CMS最近建议的、为低风险地区面对面探访设定角色的方针）可以避免未来的痛苦。

28011.title: Five-Year Impacts of Group-Based Financial Education and Savings Promotion for Ugandan Youth
28011.zh_title: 乌干达青年群体金融教育与储蓄促进的五年影响
28011.authors: Samantha Horn, Julian Jamison, Dean Karlan, Jonathan Zinman
28011.abstract: We experimentally evaluate group-based financial education, savings account access, or both for members of Ugandan youth groups. We measure both short- and long-run impacts with one- and five- year endline household surveys. Education, but not account access, increases measured financial knowledge and trust at one-year. At five-years, knowledge effects essentially disappear, and trust effects weaken. However, savings and income increase for each treatment at both endlines, which is noteworthy given the interventions’ low cost and the long time horizon of our second endline. Exploring potential mechanisms, we find evidence consistent with multiple pathways to behavior change and outcome improvement.
28011.zh_abstract: 我们通过实验评估了针对乌干达青年群体成员的群体金融教育、储蓄账户获取或两者结合的效果。我们通过一年和五年的终线家庭调查来衡量短期和长期影响。在一年时，教育（而非账户获取）提高了测得的金融知识和信任度。在五年时，知识效应基本消失，信任效应减弱。然而，在每个终线期，每种处理组的储蓄和收入均有所增加，考虑到干预措施的低成本以及我们第二次终线调查的长期时间跨度，这一点值得关注。在探索潜在机制时，我们发现了与行为改变和结果改善的多条路径相一致的证据。

28010.title: The Persistence of Miscalibration
28010.authors: Michael Boutros, Itzhak Ben-David, John R. Graham, Campbell R. Harvey, John W. Payne
28010.abstract: Using 14,800 forecasts of one-year S&P 500 returns made by Chief Financial Officers over a 12-year period, we track the individual executives who provide multiple forecasts to study how their beliefs evolve dynamically. While CFOs’ return forecasts are systematically unbiased, their confidence intervals are far too narrow, implying significant miscalibration. We find that when return realizations fall outside of ex-ante confidence intervals, CFOs’ subsequent confidence intervals widen considerably. These results are consistent with a model of Bayesian learning which suggests that the evolution of beliefs should be impacted by return realizations. However, the magnitude of the updating is dampened by the strong conviction in beliefs inherent in the initial miscalibration and, as a result, miscalibration persists.
28010.zh_abstract: 利用首席财务官在12年间对一年期标普500指数回报率的14,800次预测，我们追踪了提供多次预测的个别高管，以研究他们的信念如何动态演变。虽然CFO的回报率预测在系统上无偏，但其置信区间过窄，表明存在显著的校准错误。我们发现，当回报实现值落在事前置信区间之外时，CFO随后的置信区间会显著扩大。这些结果与贝叶斯学习模型一致，该模型表明信念的演变应受到回报实现值的影响。然而，更新幅度因初始校准错误中固有的强烈信念而受到抑制，因此校准错误持续存在。
28010.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：D03, D83, D84, E03, G30, G41

28009.title: Product Recalls and Firm Reputation
28009.abstract: Product-recall data and information on stock-price reactions to recalls are used to estimate the value of reputation in a model in which product quality is not contractible. A recall is the result of a product defect that signals low effort. The recall triggers a reduction in the firm's product price and value which then both rise steadily until its next defect occurs. We estimate that reputation accounts for 8.3 percent of firm value and that welfare is 26 percent of its first best level. A policy intervention that attains first best is a recall tax accompanied by a flow subsidy.
28009.zh_abstract: 利用产品召回数据以及召回对股价反应的信息，我们在一个产品质量不可契约化的模型中估计了声誉的价值。召回是产品缺陷的结果，表明低努力水平。召回引发企业产品价格和价值的下降，随后两者稳步上升，直到下一次缺陷发生。我们估计声誉占企业价值的8.3%，福利水平为最优水平的26%。实现最优的政策干预是征收召回税并辅以流量补贴。

28008.title: A New Measure of Utilization-adjusted TFP Growth for Europe and the United States
28008.zh_title: 欧洲与美国利用调整后的全要素生产率增长的新度量
28008.authors: Diego A. Comin, Javier Quintana Gonzalez, Tom G. Schmitz, Antonella Trigari
28008.abstract: We compute new estimates for Total Factor Productivity (TFP) growth in the United States and in five European countries. Departing from standard methods, we account for positive profits and use firm surveys to proxy for unobserved changes in factor utilization. These novelties have a major impact, especially in Europe, where our estimated TFP growth series are less volatile and less cyclical than the ones obtained with standard methods. Based on our approach, we provide annual industry-level and aggregate TFP series, as well as the first estimates of utilization-adjusted quarterly TFP growth in Europe.
28008.zh_abstract: 我们为美国和五个欧洲国家计算了全要素生产率增长的新估计值。与标准方法不同，我们考虑了正利润，并使用企业调查来代理要素利用率的未观测变化。这些创新产生了重大影响，尤其是在欧洲，我们估计的全要素生产率增长序列比标准方法得到的序列波动性更小、周期性更弱。基于我们的方法，我们提供了年度行业层面和总体的全要素生产率序列，以及欧洲首个利用调整后的季度全要素生产率增长估计值。
28008.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, ME, PR, TWP；JEL：E01, E30, O30, O40

28070.title: Land Quality
28070.authors: J. Vernon Henderson, Adam Storeygard, David N. Weil
28070.abstract: We develop a new measure of land quality by estimating weights in a Poisson regression of grid-cell population on geographic characteristics and country fixed effects. Aggregating to countries, we construct average land quality (ALQ) and quality-adjusted population density (QAPD). We show: First, current income per capita is positively correlated with ALQ. Second, while income today is unrelated to conventional population density, it is strongly negatively related to QAPD. Third, this negative relationship was not present in 1820 and emerged because today’s lower income countries have experienced faster subsequent population growth. Fourth, countries with higher average land quality began sustained modern economic growth earlier, and this earlier takeoff largely explains the modern income-ALQ relationship. We posit a framework in which land quality induced denser populations in Malthusian equilibrium and, via agglomeration, earlier takeoffs. Less dense countries experienced larger population multipliers during their later demographic transitions due to imported health technologies.
28070.zh_abstract: 我们通过估计一个将网格单元人口对地理特征和国家固定效应进行泊松回归的权重，开发了一种新的土地质量衡量指标。汇总到国家层面，我们构建了平均土地质量（ALQ）和质量调整后的人口密度（QAPD）。我们表明：第一，当前人均收入与ALQ正相关。第二，虽然当前收入与传统人口密度无关，但与QAPD强烈负相关。第三，这种负相关关系在1820年并不存在，而是因为当今收入较低的国家随后经历了更快的人口增长。第四，平均土地质量较高的国家更早开始持续的现代经济增长，而这种更早的起飞在很大程度上解释了现代收入与ALQ之间的关系。我们提出了一个框架，其中土地质量在马尔萨斯均衡中导致人口更密集，并通过集聚效应导致更早的经济起飞。人口较不密集的国家在随后的 demographic transition 中，由于引进了健康技术，经历了更大的人口乘数效应。

28069.title: Corporate Governance, Business Group Governance and Economic Development Traps
28069.zh_title: 公司治理、商业集团治理与经济发展陷阱
28069.authors: Luis Dau, Randall Morck, Bernard Yeung
28069.abstract: Every firm in a developed economy relies on the mere existence of countless other firms to keep prices competitive up and down all supply chains. Without this network externality, no firm forms; and without many firms, no network forms; locking in a low-income trap. Business group governance supersedes corporate governance in most developing economies and in the rapid catch-up development phases of most high-income economies by hierarchically coordinating firms in multiple industries, internalizing this network externality. High-income economies grow via creative destruction - creative firms imposing a negative externality upon firms they destroy or disrupt, but a larger positive innovation-related externality upon the whole economy. Business groups avoid creative self-destruction, innovation by one group firm that disrupts another. Corporate governance supersedes business group governance in high-income economies to facilitate productivity growth. If business group governance does not retreat, productivity growth is impaired and a middle-income trap can result.
28069.zh_abstract: 在发达经济体中，每家企业都依赖于无数其他企业的存在，以保持所有供应链上下游的价格竞争力。没有这种网络外部性，企业就无法形成；而没有众多企业，网络也无法形成，从而陷入低收入陷阱。在大多数发展中经济体以及多数高收入经济体快速追赶的发展阶段，商业集团治理通过层级化协调多个行业的企业，将这种网络外部性内部化，从而取代了公司治理。高收入经济体通过创造性破坏实现增长——创造性企业对其摧毁或颠覆的企业施加负外部性，但对整个经济产生更大的与创新相关的正外部性。商业集团会避免创造性的自我毁灭，即一个集团企业的创新扰乱另一个集团企业。在高收入经济体中，公司治理取代商业集团治理以促进生产率增长。如果商业集团治理不退出，生产率增长将受到损害，并可能导致中等收入陷阱。

28068.title: Effects of the COVID-19 Pandemic on Domestic Violence in Los Angeles
28068.zh_title: COVID-19疫情对洛杉矶家庭暴力的影响
28068.authors: Amalia R. Miller, Carmit Segal, Melissa K. Spencer
28068.abstract: Around the world, policymakers and news reports warned that the COVID-19 pandemic, and attendant restrictions on individual mobility and commercial activity, could lead to a surge in domestic violence (DV). Some prominent initial studies of the effects of the pandemic showed evidence of greater DV incidence, but findings were inconsistent across locations and DV measures. This paper focuses on a single major city, Los Angeles, to measure the impact of the initial pandemic shutdown on three DV measures based on police data (911 calls, crime incidents, and arrests) as well as measures based on two non-police administrative sources (the county DV hotline and hospital records). After confirming the prior finding of an increase in DV calls to police during the shutdown, we also show that calls to the hotline increased. However, we find that DV crimes recorded by police and hospital visits by female assault (and DV) victims both decreased significantly, suggesting that the increase in calls came from higher reporting rates, possibly for verbal disputes. Arrests per population for DV crimes were unaffected by the shutdown, but a higher share of DV crimes led to arrests. This points against a decrease in the intensity of policing of DV crimes driving the lower crime rate. We conclude that the initial LA shutdown increased the rates at which people contacted authorities about domestic-related concerns, but decreased the overall incidence of physical DV crimes in the population.
28068.zh_abstract: 全球范围内，政策制定者和新闻报道警告称，COVID-19疫情及其伴随的个人流动性和商业活动限制可能导致家庭暴力激增。一些关于疫情影响的初步重要研究显示了家庭暴力发生率上升的证据，但不同地点和家庭暴力衡量指标之间的结果并不一致。本文聚焦于洛杉矶这一主要城市，基于警方数据（911报警电话、犯罪事件和逮捕）以及两个非警方行政来源（县家庭暴力热线和医院记录）的衡量指标，衡量疫情初期封锁对三种家庭暴力指标的影响。在确认了封锁期间警方接到的家庭暴力报警电话增加这一先前发现后，我们还显示热线电话也增加了。然而，我们发现警方记录的家庭暴力犯罪和女性攻击（及家庭暴力）受害者的医院就诊次数均显著下降，这表明报警电话的增加源于更高的报告率，可能涉及言语纠纷。人均家庭暴力犯罪逮捕率未受封锁影响，但更高比例的家庭暴力犯罪导致了逮捕。这反驳了家庭暴力犯罪执法强度下降导致犯罪率降低的观点。我们得出结论，洛杉矶初期的封锁提高了人们就家庭相关问题联系当局的频率，但降低了人群中身体家庭暴力犯罪的总体发生率。
28068.meta: Programs：EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I18, J12, J16, K14, K42

28067.title: Economic Studies on the Opioid Crisis: A Review
28067.zh_title: 阿片类药物危机的经济学研究：综述
28067.authors: Johanna Catherine Maclean, Justine Mallatt, Christopher J. Ruhm, Kosali Simon
28067.abstract:
The United States has experienced an unprecedented crisis related to the misuse of and addiction to opioids. As of 2018, 128 Americans die each day of an opioid overdose, and total economic costs associated with opioid misuse are estimated to be more than $\$500$ billion annually. The crisis has evolved in three phases, starting in the 1990s and continuing through 2010 with a massive increase in use of prescribed opioids associated with lax prescribing regulations and aggressive marketing eﬀorts by the pharmaceutical industry. A second phase included tightening restrictions on prescribed opioids, reformulation of some commonly misused prescription medications, and a shift to heroin consumption over the period 2010 to 2013. Since 2013, the third phase of the crisis has included a movement towards synthetic opioids, especially fentanyl, and a continued tightening of opioid prescribing regulations, along with the growth of both harm reduction and addiction treatment access policies.

Economic research, using innovative frameworks, causal methods, and rich data, has added to our understanding of the causes and consequences of the crisis. This body of research also identiﬁes intended and unintended impacts of policies designed to address the crisis. Although there is general agreement that the causes of the crisis include a combination of supply- and demand-side factors, and interactions between them, there is less consensus regarding the relative importance of each. Studies show that regulations can reduce opioid prescribing but may have less impact on root causes of the crisis and, in some cases, have spillover eﬀects resulting in greater use of more harmful substances obtained in illicit markets, where regulation is less possible. There are eﬀective opioid use disorder treatments available, but access, stigma, and cost hurdles have stiﬂed utilization, resulting in a large degree of under-treatment in the U.S.

How challenges brought about by the COVID-19 pandemic may intersect with the opioid crisis is unclear. Emerging areas for future research include understanding how societal and healthcare systems disruptions aﬀect opioid use, as well as which regulations and policies most eﬀectively reduce potentially inappropriate prescription opioid use and illicit opioid sources without unintended negative consequences.
28067.zh_abstract: 美国经历了一场与阿片类药物滥用和成瘾相关的空前危机。截至2018年，每天有128名美国人死于阿片类药物过量，与阿片类药物滥用相关的总经济成本估计每年超过5000亿美元。这场危机经历了三个阶段：从20世纪90年代开始，持续到2010年，由于宽松的处方规定和制药行业的积极营销努力，处方阿片类药物使用量大幅增加；第二阶段包括2010年至2013年期间收紧处方阿片类药物的限制、重新配制一些常用滥用的处方药，以及转向海洛因消费；自2013年以来，危机的第三阶段包括转向合成阿片类药物，尤其是芬太尼，同时继续收紧阿片类药物处方规定，并发展减少伤害和成瘾治疗可及性政策。经济学研究利用创新框架、因果方法和丰富数据，加深了我们对危机原因和后果的理解。这一研究体系还识别了旨在应对危机的政策所产生的预期和非预期影响。尽管普遍认为危机的原因包括供需双方因素及其相互作用，但对于各因素的相对重要性尚未达成共识。研究表明，法规可以减少阿片类药物处方，但可能对危机的根本原因影响较小，并且在某些情况下会产生溢出效应，导致在监管较难的非法市场上更多地使用更有害的物质。存在有效的阿片类药物使用障碍治疗方法，但可及性、污名化和成本障碍阻碍了其利用，导致美国存在大量治疗不足的情况。COVID-19疫情带来的挑战如何与阿片类药物危机相互交织尚不清楚。未来研究的新兴领域包括理解社会和医疗系统中断如何影响阿片类药物使用，以及哪些法规和政策能在不产生意外负面后果的情况下最有效地减少潜在不适当的处方阿片类药物使用和非法阿片类药物来源。

28066.title: Forward Guidance and Durable Goods Demand
28066.zh_title: 前瞻指引与耐用品需求
28066.abstract: Durable goods attenuate the power of forward guidance. The extensive and intensive margins of durable goods demand are both more sensitive to the contemporaneous user cost than to future user costs. Changes in the contemporaneous real interest rate directly affect the contemporaneous user cost and durable demand, whereas promises of low future real interest rates have weaker effects through equilibrium price changes. Quantitatively, reducing the real interest rate one year from now increases output by only forty percent as much as reducing the real interest rate today. Our results are little affected by the maturity of financial assets that finance durable purchases.
28066.zh_abstract: 耐用品削弱了前瞻指引的力量。耐用品需求的广延边际和集约边际对当期用户成本比未来用户成本更为敏感。当期实际利率的变化直接影响当期用户成本和耐用品需求，而承诺未来低实际利率则通过均衡价格变化产生较弱的影响。定量来看，将一年后的实际利率降低一个单位，其产出增加效果仅为降低当期实际利率的40%。我们的结果几乎不受为耐用品购买融资的金融资产期限的影响。
28066.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：E21, E22, E43, E52, E58

28065.title: Stereotypes in Financial Literacy: Evidence from PISA
28065.zh_title: 金融素养中的刻板印象：来自PISA的证据
28065.abstract: We examine gender differences in financial literacy among high school students in Italy using data from the 2012 Programme for International Student Assessment (PISA). Gender differences in financial literacy are large among the young in Italy. They are present in all regions and are particularly severe in the South and the Islands. Combining the rich PISA data with a variety of other indicators, we provide a thorough analysis of the potential determinants of the gender gap in financial literacy. We find that parental background, in particular the role of mothers, matters for the financial knowledge of girls. Moreover, we show that the social and cultural environment in which girls and boys live plays a crucial role in explaining gender differences. We also show that history matters: Medieval commercial hubs and the nuclear family structure created conditions favorable to the transformation of the role of women in society, and shaped gender differences in financial literacy as well.
28065.zh_abstract: 我们利用2012年国际学生评估项目的数据，研究了意大利高中生在金融素养方面的性别差异。在意大利年轻人中，金融素养的性别差异很大。这些差异存在于所有地区，在南部和岛屿地区尤为严重。通过将丰富的PISA数据与各种其他指标相结合，我们对金融素养性别差异的潜在决定因素进行了全面分析。我们发现，父母背景，特别是母亲的作用，对女孩的金融知识很重要。此外，我们表明女孩和男孩所处的社会和文化环境在解释性别差异方面起着关键作用。我们还表明历史很重要：中世纪的商业中心以及核心家庭结构为妇女在社会中角色的转变创造了有利条件，并同样塑造了金融素养方面的性别差异。

28064.title: Choices and Outcomes in Assignment Mechanisms: The Allocation of Deceased Donor Kidneys
28064.zh_title: 分配机制中的选择与结果：已故捐赠者肾脏的分配
28064.authors: Nikhil Agarwal, Charles Hodgson, Paulo Somaini
28064.abstract: While the mechanism design paradigm emphasizes notions of efficiency based on agent preferences, policymakers often focus on alternative objectives. School districts emphasize educational achievement, and transplantation communities focus on patient survival. It is unclear whether choice-based mechanisms perform well when assessed based on these outcomes. This paper evaluates the assignment mechanism for allocating deceased donor kidneys on the basis of patient life-years from transplantation (LYFT).We examine the role of choice in increasing LYFT and compare realized assignments to benchmarks that remove choice. Our model combines choices and outcomes in order to study how selection affects LYFT. We show how to identify and estimate the model using instruments derived from the mechanism. The estimates suggest that the design in use selects patients with better post-transplant survival prospects and matches them well, resulting in an average LYFT of 9.29, which is 1.75 years more than a random assignment. However, the maximum aggregate LYFT is 14.08. Realizing the majority of the gains requires transplanting relatively healthy patients, who would have longer life expectancies even without a transplant. Therefore, a policymaker faces a dilemma between transplanting patients who are sicker and those for whom life will be extended the longest.
28064.zh_abstract: 尽管机制设计范式强调基于代理人偏好的效率概念，但政策制定者通常关注替代目标。学区强调教育成就，移植界关注患者生存。当基于这些结果进行评估时，基于选择的机制是否表现良好尚不清楚。本文基于患者移植后生命年数这一指标，评估了已故捐赠者肾脏的分配机制。我们考察了选择在增加移植后生命年数中的作用，并将实际分配与去除选择的基准进行了比较。我们的模型结合了选择和结果，以研究选择如何影响移植后生命年数。我们展示了如何利用源自该机制的工具变量来识别和估计该模型。估计结果表明，当前使用的设计选择了移植后生存前景更好的患者，并进行了良好匹配，导致平均移植后生命年数为9.29年，比随机分配多1.75年。然而，最大总移植后生命年数为14.08年。实现大部分收益需要移植相对健康的患者，即使没有移植，这些患者也会有更长的预期寿命。因此，政策制定者面临着在移植病情更重的患者与移植寿命延长最长的患者之间的两难选择。

28063.title: FinTech Adoption and Household Risk-Taking: From Digital Payments to Platform Investments
28063.zh_title: 金融科技采纳与家庭风险承担：从数字支付到平台投资
28063.authors: Claire Yurong Hong, Xiaomeng Lu, Jun Pan
28063.abstract: We study household finance in the age of FinTech, where consumption, payments, and investments take place via all-in-one super-apps. We hypothesize that FinTech adoption can improve household risk-taking by breaking down the traditional physical and psychological barriers and enhance financial inclusion. Taking advantage of an individual-level FinTech dataset, we find that higher FinTech adoption, both at the individual-level and the county-level instrumented by distance-from-Hangzhou, results in higher participation and more risk-taking in mutual-fund investments. Moreover, individuals who are otherwise more constrained, those with higher risk tolerance or living in under-banked counties, stand to benefit more from the advent of FinTech.
28063.zh_abstract: 我们研究了金融科技时代的家庭金融，其中消费、支付和投资通过一体化超级应用进行。我们假设，金融科技的采纳可以通过打破传统的物理和心理障碍来改善家庭风险承担，并增强金融包容性。利用个人层面的金融科技数据集，我们发现，无论是个人层面还是以距杭州距离为工具变量的县级层面，更高的金融科技采纳都会导致更高的共同基金投资参与度和更多的风险承担。此外，原本受到更多约束的个人、风险承受能力较高的人或生活在银行服务不足县的人，从金融科技的出现中获益更多。

28062.title: How Would Medicare for All Affect Health System Capacity? Evidence from Medicare for Some
28062.zh_title: 全民医保将如何影响卫生系统能力？来自部分医保的证据
28062.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Joshua D. Gottlieb, Jeffrey Hicks
28062.abstract: Proposals to create a national health care plan such as "Medicare for All" rely heavily on reducing the prices that insurers pay for health care. These changes affect physicians' short-run incentives for care provision and may also change health care providers' incentives to invest in capacity, thereby influencing the availability of care in the long term. We provide evidence on these responses using a major Medicare payment change combined with survey data on physicians' time use. We find evidence that physicians increase their time spent on capacity building when remuneration increases, and that they are subsequently more willing to accept new patients---especially those who may be the residual claimants on marginal capacity. These forces imply that short-run supply curves likely differ from long-run supply curves. Policymakers need to account for how major changes to payment incentives would influence the investments that determine health system capacity.
28062.zh_abstract: 创建国家医疗计划（如“全民医保”）的提案在很大程度上依赖于降低保险公司为医疗保健支付的价格。这些变化会影响医生提供护理的短期激励，也可能改变医疗保健提供者投资于能力的激励，从而影响长期护理的可及性。我们利用一次重大的医疗保险支付变化，结合医生时间使用的调查数据，提供了关于这些反应的证据。我们发现，当报酬增加时，医生会增加用于能力建设的时间，随后他们更愿意接受新患者——尤其是那些可能是边际能力剩余索取者的患者。这些力量意味着短期供给曲线可能与长期供给曲线不同。政策制定者需要考虑支付激励的重大变化将如何影响决定卫生系统能力的投资。

28061.title: Answering the Call of Automation: How the Labor Market Adjusted to Mechanizing Telephone Operation
28061.zh_title: 响应自动化的召唤：劳动力市场如何适应电话接线机械化
28061.abstract: In the early 1900s, telephone operation was among the most common jobs for American women, and telephone operators were ubiquitous. Between 1920 and 1940, AT&T undertook one of the largest automation investments in modern history, replacing operators with mechanical switching technology in over half of the U.S. telephone network. Using variation across U.S. cities in the timing of adoption, we study how this wave of automation affected the labor market for young women. Although automation eliminated most of these jobs, it did not reduce future cohorts' overall employment: the decline in operators was counteracted by employment growth in middle-skill clerical jobs and lower- skill service jobs, including in new categories of work. Using a new genealogy-based census-linking method, we show that incumbent telephone operators were most impacted, and a decade later more likely to be in lower-paying occupations or no longer working.
28061.zh_abstract: 在20世纪初，电话接线是美国女性最常见的职业之一，电话接线员无处不在。1920年至1940年间，AT&T进行了现代史上最大规模的自动化投资之一，用机械交换技术取代了美国超过一半电话网络中的接线员。利用美国各城市采用该技术的时间差异，我们研究了这波自动化浪潮如何影响年轻女性的劳动力市场。尽管自动化消除了大部分此类工作岗位，但它并未减少未来群体的整体就业：接线员的减少被中等技能文职工作和低技能服务工作的就业增长所抵消，其中包括新的工作类别。利用一种新的基于家谱的人口普查关联方法，我们表明在职电话接线员受到的影响最大，十年后她们更可能从事低薪职业或不再工作。
28061.meta: Programs：DAE, LS；JEL：J21, J24, J62, J63, M51, M54, N32, O33

28060.title: Productivity Shocks, Long-Term Contracts and Earnings Dynamics
28060.zh_title: 生产率冲击、长期合同与收入动态
28060.abstract: This paper examines how employer- and worker-specific productivity shocks transmit to earnings and employment in an economy with search frictions and firm commitment. We develop an equilibrium search model with worker and firm shocks and characterize the optimal contract offered by competing firms to attract and retain workers. In equilibrium, risk-neutral firms provide only partial insurance against shocks to risk-averse workers and offer contingent contracts, where payments are backloaded in good times and frontloaded in bad times. We prove that there exists a unique spot target wage, which serves as an attraction point for smooth wage adjustments. The structural model is estimated on matched employer-employee data from Sweden. The estimates indicate that firms absorb persistent worker and firm shocks, with respective passthrough values of 27 and 11%, but price permanent worker differences, a large contributor (32%) to variations in wages. A large share of the earnings growth variance can be attributed to job mobility, which interacts with productivity shocks. We evaluate the effects of redistributive policies and find that almost 40% of government-provided insurance is undone by crowding out firm-provided insurance.
